restaurant name: nice two Meat u Central Eastville
text:
nice two Meat u Central Eastville ⭐️ Overall Summary

**Nice to Meat U – Central Eastville** is a contemporary Korean barbecue restaurant known for its casual yet vibrant dining atmosphere and attentive tableside service. With an overall rating around **3.8–4.1/5**  the venue appeals to diners looking for a social grill-your-own experience with quality meats and generous side dishes.

🍖 Food Quality

The restaurant specializes in Korean BBQ with a wide selection of grilled meats — particularly **smoked pork belly  pork jowl  and beef cuts** — which reviewers often describe as flavorful and well-prepared. Many diners appreciate the rich  spicy marinades and complementary sauces especially when paired with the unlimited Korean-style side dishes (including kimchi  salads  and dipping sauces).

* Meat is generally tender with good seasoning  and portions are considered satisfying for the price range (typically ~500 – 1 000 THB per person).
* Side items like rice  soup  and seaweed are noted as good complements  though some reviewers find certain portions (e.g.  soup or some sides) small or slightly higher priced.

👩‍🍳 Service

One of the most consistently highlighted strengths is the attentive and proactive service. Staff frequently assist with grilling  ensure diners’ preferences are met  and help manage cooking — making the experience approachable even for those new to Korean BBQ.
Unlimited refills of kimchi and other banchan (Korean side dishes) are often mentioned positively.

🍷 Ambiance & Atmosphere

The restaurant’s décor leans toward a modern  youthful Korean theme  typically bright and casual. Diners find it comfortable for small groups or family meals  with space that doesn’t feel cramped. The vibe is lively but not overly noisy.

💸 Value for Money

Most reviewers feel the price reflects good quality and service  especially with the meats and sides offered. However:

* A few comments suggest **some dishes or add-ons (e.g.  soups  rice bowls) can be perceived as slightly expensive for portion size  depending on personal expectations.

📌 Pros & Cons (Summary)

Pros:
✔️ Quality grilled meats with flavorful marinades
✔️ Friendly and helpful staff offering tableside grilling
✔️ Unlimited side dishes and sauces
✔️ Comfortable  social dining environment

Cons:
⚠️ Portions of some sides (e.g.  soup) and certain add-ons may feel modest for their price
⚠️ Prices overall are mid-to-upper range for casual BBQ diners.

📝 Recommendation

Nice to Meat U – Central Eastville is recommended for groups  family meals  or casual Korean cuisine outings where interactive BBQ and attentive service are priorities. While not a fine-dining venue  it offers a reliably enjoyable Korean BBQ experience with good meat quality  engaging service  and a pleasant atmosphere. nice two Meat u Central Eastville I was craving for beef  so I asked one of staffs whether I could dine alone. nice two Meat u ICONSIAM God korean bbq nice two Meat u ICONSIAM Very good. The staff were helpful.
The food was delicious. The restaurant has plenty of tables. nice two Meat u ICONSIAM Nice to Meat U at ICONSIAM was one of the best dining experiences I’ve had in Bangkok  especially if you love premium beef and a relaxed but upscale atmosphere.

From the moment we arrived  the staff were welcoming and attentive without being overbearing. Even though ICONSIAM can be busy  the restaurant itself feels comfortable and well-organized  making it a great place for both casual dinners and special occasions.

The quality of the meat is honestly the highlight. Every cut we tried was tender  flavorful  and cooked exactly as requested. You can really taste the difference in the quality — rich  juicy  and well-balanced without needing heavy seasoning. The menu is easy to understand  and the staff are happy to explain the different cuts and make recommendations based on what you like.

Side dishes and sauces complemented the meat perfectly and didn’t overpower it. Portions were generous  and everything came out at a good pace  so we never felt rushed. Drinks were also well curated and paired nicely with the food.

What I appreciated most was the consistency — from service to food quality to presentation  everything felt thoughtfully done. Prices are reasonable for the location and quality  especially considering this is ICONSIAM.

Overall  Nice to Meat U is a great choice if you’re looking for high-quality meat  good service  and a comfortable dining experience by the river. I would definitely come back and recommend it to anyone visiting ICONSIAM or Bangkok.

The restaurant is also simply furnished  almost minimalist in style. The menu selection is somewhat limited  especially for vegetarians. However  the food and presentation are excellent.

An absolutely fantastic concept and highly recommended.

A prime location for Ayutthaya Historical Park and the Summer Palace in Bang Pa In.
